title: Alphabet Soup [Cobblemon]
description:
Cobblemon Unown Addon
So many letters.
body:
# Alphabet Soup!
Alphabet Soup is a Cobblemon Addon that implements one singular Pokemon, but with the full alphabet variations. You want letters? You get letters!
So many letters.

## How to Install
Make sure you have the latest version of Cobblemon. Download the latest version, and add the .zip to both "resourcepacks" folder and to your save's "datapacks" folder.

## Spawns
Unown has two spawns:
Inside a stronghold
&
Anywhere in The End


(inspired/referenced from nub's unown sprites!)![Alphabet Soup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IJRcfnAh/images/92f41be7faf59bcd9efea90b401b48d3575c7164.png)
